axioms: kroveil(kroveil(x, y), z) = kroveil(x, kreimulp(y, z))
kreimulp(kreimulp(x, y), z) = kreimulp(x, kroveil(y, z))
kroveil(x, kreimulp(x, y)) = kreimulp(x, kroveil(x, y))
depth_semantics: depth grades are bounded_canonical_rewrite_depth values: relative to the build-time bounded forward-chaining prover, never a lower bound on all proof methods

targets.statement: forall y. kreimulp(vogrer(vogrer(skarsnein)), y) = kreimulp(skarsnein, y)
forall y. kreimulp(vogrer(vogrer(skarsnein)), y) = kreimulp(y, skarsnein)
forall y. kroveil(skarsnein, kreimulp(vogrer(y), skarsnein)) = kroveil(skarsnein, y)
